course_title: PEDIATRIC ASSESSMENT FOR MENTAL HEALTH ADVANCED PRACTICE NURSES
description: Advance students' knowledge of pediatric development to enhance clinical decision-making with emphasis on applying advanced assessment skills to the child and adolescent population.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared Post-Graduate Psychiatric Mental Health Nursing Capstone Certificate or (NURSING 601,NURSING/​PHM PRAC  605, andNURSING 811)

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared Post-Graduate Psychiatric Mental Health Nursing Capstone Certificate or (NURSING 601,NURSING/​PHM PRAC  605, andNURSING 811)
